Module com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java
Package com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java

Interface UriVerifier

All Superinterfaces:
ExtensibleObjectVerifier<UriVerifier,URI>
All Known Implementing Classes:
UriVerifierImpl
public interface UriVerifier extends ExtensibleObjectVerifier<UriVerifier,URI>
Verifies the requirements of a URI.

All methods (except those found in ExtensibleObjectVerifier) imply ExtensibleObjectVerifier.isNotNull().

  • Method Summary

    Modifier and Type
    Method
    Description
    UrlVerifier
    asUrl()
    Returns a verifier for the URL representation of the value.
    UriVerifier
    asUrl(Consumer<UrlVerifier> consumer)
    Verifies nested requirements.
    UriVerifier
    isAbsolute()
    Ensures that the actual value is absolute.

    Methods declared in interface com.github.cowwoc.requirements.java.extension.ExtensibleObjectVerifier

    asString, asString, getActual, isEqualTo, isEqualTo, isInstanceOf, isNotEqualTo, isNotEqualTo, isNotInstanceOf, isNotNull, isNotOneOf, isNotSameObjectAs, isNull, isOneOf, isSameObjectAs

  • Method Details

    • isAbsolute

      UriVerifier isAbsolute()
      Ensures that the actual value is absolute.
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if actual value is not absolute

    • asUrl

      UrlVerifier asUrl()
      Returns a verifier for the URL representation of the value.
      Returns:
      a verifier for the URL representation of the value
      Throws:
      IllegalArgumentException - if the actual value cannot be converted to a URL

    • asUrl

      UriVerifier asUrl(Consumer<UrlVerifier> consumer)
      Verifies nested requirements. This mechanism can be used to group related requirements.

      See asUrl() for exceptions that may be thrown to the consumer.

      Parameters:
      consumer - verifies URLs
      Returns:
      the updated verifier
      Throws:
      NullPointerException - if consumer is null
